# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Family-run Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand. Two camps (Bo Phut and Plai Laem). Rated 5.0 out of 5 on Google with 396 verified reviews. Open Monday to Saturday since 2020.

## About

Chor Ratchawat (ช.รัชวาทย์) is a family-run Muay Thai camp on Koh Samui island in the Gulf of Thailand. Founded in 2020 by Kru Ratchawat, the gym has grown from a single street-side ring in Bo Phut to two locations across the island. We welcome all levels, from complete beginners to professional fighters.

We operate two camps:
- **Bo Phut Camp**: Intimate, authentic street gym in Fisherman's Village, Bo Phut. Ideal for focused 1-on-1 training and small groups.
- **Plai Laem Camp**: Larger, fully equipped facility near Big Buddha. Full-size ring, heavy bags, conditioning area, on-site rooms and a private bungalow. The Fighter Program runs here only.

Ten Thai trainers teach at the camp. Most have professional fight records, several hold Thailand Boxing Sport Authority C-licences, and a few have competed at Rajadamnern Stadium, One Lumpinee, and Channel 7. Training runs six days a week (closed Sunday for training; the Plai Laem accommodation is bookable on Sundays). Group classes run 9:00 to 10:30 and 17:00 to 18:30. Private sessions are 60-minute slots between 7:00 and 17:00. The Fighter Program runs morning 7:30 to 10:00 and afternoon 16:00 to 18:30, six days a week, at Plai Laem only.

We hold a 5.0 out of 5 star rating on Google at both camps: 255 reviews at Bo Phut and 141 at Plai Laem, for a total of 396 verified reviews. Students mention patient trainers, beginner-friendly classes, clean facilities, and a welcoming international community.

## Programs

### Group Classes (Adults)
Group sessions six days a week at both camps. Morning 9:00 to 10:30 and evening 17:00 to 18:30. Each class covers pad work, bag work, clinch technique, conditioning, and sparring. All levels welcome. Trainers walk the room and adjust intensity for each student.

### Private 1-on-1 Training
60-minute private sessions with a dedicated trainer. Fully customised to your level and goals (technique refinement, fight preparation, fitness). Slots available between 7:00 and 17:00 by appointment. Booking cutoff: 12 hours before for the 7:00 and 8:00 slots, 2 hours before for any other slot. Six concurrent slots per camp; capacity is camp-wide rather than tied to a specific trainer.

### Kids Muay Thai
Group classes for children ages 8-13 at both camps. Younger children (ages 3-7) train through private sessions, either 1-on-1 or in small groups of up to 3 kids. Focus on discipline, coordination, basic Muay Thai technique, and fitness in a safe, encouraging environment.

### Fighter Program
9,500 THB per month at Plai Laem camp only. Structured month-long preparation built around your fight date. Strict schedule: morning run from 7:30 into technique and pad work until 10:00, afternoon sparring and conditioning from 16:00 to 18:30. Includes advanced pad work, sparring, clinch work, kettlebell and conditioning two to three times per week, fight strategy, fight matchmaking, and a corner on fight night. Fighters keep 100% of the fight purse with no camp commission. Fighter + Standard Room: 20,000 THB per month. Fighter + Private Bungalow: 25,500 THB per month (electricity billed separately at 8 THB per unit).

## Services

### Accommodation
On-site at our Plai Laem camp: 7 standard rooms and 1 private bungalow. Rooms include water and Wi-Fi. The bungalow is metered for electricity. Standard check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00. Booked as part of a Camp Stay package or directly for special requests via WhatsApp (extended stays, group bookings, bank transfer payments).

### DTV Visa Support
6-month Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) support. We provide official documentation and the enrollment letter required by the Thai e-visa portal. The 10,000 THB embassy fee is paid separately on thaievisa.go.th. Documentation prepared and delivered within 24 hours of payment. If the application is refused, we issue a training voucher of equal value (no cash refund), valid for 12 months.

### Transport
Free pickup from Nathon Pier or Koh Samui Airport for students booking weekly or monthly packages. Motorbike and scooter rentals can be arranged on request.

### Gear and Equipment
Basic training gear (gloves, shin guards, hand wraps) is available at both camps. Quality Muay Thai gear is also sold on-site.

## Pricing

All prices in Thai Baht (THB).

### Group classes (adults)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Drop-in (single session) | 400 THB |
| 1 week, 1 session/day | 2,000 THB |
| 1 week, 2 sessions/day | 3,000 THB |
| 2 weeks, 1 session/day | 3,500 THB |
| 2 weeks, 2 sessions/day | 5,500 THB |
| 1 month, 1 session/day | 5,500 THB |
| 1 month, 2 sessions/day | 7,000 THB |
| Resident monthly (Koh Samui only, 1x/day) | 3,000 THB |

### Kids (ages 8-13 group; ages 3-7 private)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Kids drop-in | 300 THB |
| Kids monthly unlimited | 2,500 THB |

### Private lessons
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Private 1-on-1 (60 min) | 800 THB |

### Fighter Program (Plai Laem only)
| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Fighter Program (1 month) | 9,500 THB |
| Fighter + Standard Room (1 month) | 20,000 THB |
| Fighter + Private Bungalow (1 month) | 25,500 THB (electricity separate) |

Payment accepted: card via Stripe (online), cash on the day, bank transfer (Wise or international wire) on request via WhatsApp.

- [Private Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/private): 1-on-1 personal sessions
- [Kids Muay Thai](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/group-kids): Children's classes ages 8-13 (3-7 private)
- [Fighter Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/fighter): Competitive fighter preparation
- [Bo Phut Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/bo-phut): Intimate street gym in Fisherman's Village
- [Plai Laem Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/plai-laem): Larger facility near Big Buddha

- [Booking](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/booking): Book and pay for sessions online
- [Accommodation](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/accommodation): Rooms and bungalow at Plai Laem
- [DTV Visa](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/visa/dtv): Destination Thailand Visa support
- [Team](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/team): Our ten Thai trainers
- [Reviews](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/reviews): Verified Google reviews
- [FAQ](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/faq): Common questions
- [Contact](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/contact): Phone, email, maps, directions

## Locations

### Bo Phut Camp
- **Address**: Soi Sunday, Tambon Bo Put, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Bo Phut, Fisherman's Village
- **Character**: Intimate street gym, authentic atmosphere
- **Hours**: Monday to Saturday (closed Sunday). Group: 9:00 to 10:30 and 17:00 to 18:30. Private: 60-minute slots between 7:00 and 17:00.

### Plai Laem Camp
- **Address**: 20, 33 หมู่ที่ 5 ปลายแหลม ซอย 13, Tambon Bo Put, Amphoe Ko Samui, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Plai Laem, near Big Buddha
- **Character**: Larger facility with full-size ring, accommodation on-site
- **Hours**: Monday to Saturday for training. Sunday open for accommodation only. Group, private, and Fighter Program all available here.
